title: DexScreener
subtitle: Real-time DEX pairs, prices, liquidity and newly launched tokens across major chains.
description:
## What it does

DexScreener market data over x402: search DEX trading pairs, read live price / liquidity / volume, and surface newly launched and trending tokens across major chains, through one provider with TRON and BSC payment routes.


## Best for

- New-pool / meme-launch radar for agents tracking fresh listings.
- Momentum and liquidity checks before entering a position.
- Pair lookups by token address or symbol.

## Endpoints

- `GET /latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}` — All DEX pairs (price/liquidity/volume/fdv) for one or more token addresses
- `GET /latest/dex/search` — Search pairs by token name/symbol/address
- `GET /token-profiles/latest/v1` — Latest token profiles (new-launch / discovery radar)

## Code usage

These routes are x402-protected minimum-price endpoints. Use the x402 CLI to pay the gateway URL. TRON Mainnet (`exact_gasfree`) route:

`https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-tron/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}`

The same path is also served on BSC (`eip155:56`, `exact_permit`) at `https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-bsc/...`.

Pay with the x402 CLI (amount in USD):

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/dexscreener-dex-data-tron/latest/dex/tokens/{tokenAddresses}' \
  --method GET \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_gasfree \
  --max-amount 0.001
```
useCase: Use to look up a token's DEX pairs/price/liquidity, search tokens, or pull the latest token profiles for new-launch / meme screening.

zh-CN.title: DexScreener
zh-CN.subtitle: 跨主流链的实时 DEX 交易对、价格、流动性与新上线代币。
zh-CN.description: 通过 x402 网关获取 DexScreener 行情:搜索交易对、读取实时价格/流动性/成交量,并发现新上线与热门代币。适合 Agent 追踪新盘、动量与 meme 上新。数据来自 DexScreener。
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。
